data.summary: The evidence provided does not sufficiently validate the requirement for live proctor monitoring or AI proctoring.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the proctoring methods, specifically live monitoring or AI proctoring. However, the evidence does not include concrete API reads or checks that confirm the implementation of these features. While the linked use case mentions AI proctoring, there are no specific details or evidence of how this is executed in the system, leading to an inconclusive status regarding the requirement's satisfaction.
gaps: No evidence of API endpoints or processes for live proctor monitoring or AI proctoring.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the implementation of live proctor monitoring or AI proctoring.
